MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Travis Campbell is present. Represented by Justin Sisco.
Attorney David Foran appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chris Dillon is present.
Attorney Samuel L. Pooler representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-30-2012 is vacated.
